prompt: Square 1:1 editorial wellness photograph. A man in his 30s with short dark hair, wearing a charcoal grey loose cotton tee, kneeling on a yoga mat in a meditative pose, bright minimalist studio with cream-white walls. Warm window light from the left. CAMERA-IN-MOTION blur — soft directional smear from a fast right-to-left lateral camera pan, slight Dutch tilt ~7° counter-clockwise, stronger blur intensity. Documentary photojournalism aesthetic, fine 35mm grain, subtle halation. No text, no logos.
